Gender Equality.reason: Includes both male and female students in physical education.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and teaches skills for a sustainable, active lifestyle (Target 4.7), aiming to impart "knowledge and skills".

Gender Equality.reason: The course explicitly promotes gender equality by being a "Physical Education [male and female]" (體育[男女合班]) class, ensuring equal participation and opportunity in sports (Target 5.5).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course promotes social inclusion and equal opportunity (Target 10.2, 10.3) by being explicitly designated as a "[male and female]" (男女合班) class.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: A very tenuous link can be inferred from learning "比賽規則" (competition rules) to the broader concept of the rule of law (Target 16.3).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course fosters cooperation through "單、雙打比賽" (singles and doubles matches), which can be inferred as a micro-level application of partnership principles (Target 17.17).
